message:
fix(server): trigger_immediate runs pre-phase hook before advancing to ForceClosing, handles already-Stopped

ShutdownSignal::trigger_immediate() previously advanced the phase
to ForceClosing before running the pre-phase hook, which meant
the hook's begin_drain() call would see ForceClosing and skip
its drain metadata setup.

Fix: Moves run_trigger_immediate_pre_phase_hook() before the
fetch_max to ForceClosing, so the hook executes while the phase
is still in its current (pre-force) state.  Also adds an early
return when the phase is already Stopped, avoiding redundant
controller.shutdown() calls.

Test: trigger_immediate_overrides_interleaved_begin_drain_metadata
installs a hook that calls begin_drain() during trigger_immediate,
verifies the drain deadline metadata is set, and confirms the
final phase is ForceClosing (not Draining).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
